quizQuestion:
彼が彼女にキスし{___}した時、,お母さんが 部屋に入って来た（のでキスできなかった）。
(He was trying to kiss his girlfriend when his mom walked in the room. (so I did not get to kiss her))
pedagogicalNote: ものだから = because (unavoidable excuse); 反面 = on the other hand; ことから = from the fact that; おうとすると = just when trying to do (interrupted); ようとする = try to do (unsuccessful)

pedagogicalNote: ものだから = because (unavoidable excuse); 反面 = on the other hand; ことから = from the fact that; おうとすると = just when trying to do (interrupted); ようとする = try to do (unsuccessful)

pedagogicalNote: ものだから = because (unavoidable excuse); 反面 = on the other hand; ことから = from the fact that; おうとすると = just when trying to do (interrupted); ようとする = try to do (unsuccessful)

quizQuestion:
茶碗を口のところまで持っ{___}きて、箸でごはんをかきこむのは行儀が悪い。
(Bringing  the bowl up to your mouth and shoveling rice in with chopsticks is bad manners.)
pedagogicalNote: て(connect) = sequential/parallel verb connector; と共に = along with/at the same time; し = and/plus (multiple reasons); か何か = or something like that; というのに = although/despite; であろうが = whether A or B it doesn't matter

quizQuestion:
医者{___}田中さん
(The Tanaka san who is a doctor.)
pedagogicalNote: である = formal copula; なる(adj) = used like な of na-adjectives; な(particle) = na-adjective particle; ばかり = have just done; わざとらしい = fake/pretending; もとい = rather/correction; なぜなら = because (formal)
